options.code:
# Create a simple class to format data
class UserProfile:
    def __init__(self, name, email):
        self.name = name
        self.email = email
    
    def greet(self):
        return f"Welcome back, {self.name}! ({self.email})"

# Access ToolJet globals for the current user
user = UserProfile(tj_globals.currentUser.firstName, tj_globals.currentUser.email)

# Update a text component on the canvas
components.text1.setText(user.greet())

# Trigger another query (e.g., a GET request)
queries.getSalesData.run()
